description: Advertising review skill claim types — taxonomy for Skill Corpus entries.

claim_types.name: Health Claim
claim_types.description: Nutritional, wellness, or general health benefit claims including implied health outcomes.

claim_types.name: Superlative Claim
claim_types.description: Absolute, omnibus, or unsubstantiated efficacy and superiority wording.

claim_types.name: Comparative Claim
claim_types.description: Comparative or superiority claims against competitors or benchmarks.

claim_types.name: Certification Claim
claim_types.description: Certification, patent, award, or laboratory evidence references in advertising.

claim_types.name: Performance Claim
claim_types.description: Quantitative efficacy, capacity, or performance claims requiring substantiation.
